summary: Today's discussions highlight the evolving dynamics of AI pricing and the rapid expansion of model capabilities. Simon Willison details Anthropic's swift reversal on Claude Code pricing, underscoring the volatility in commercializing AI tools. Meanwhile, Ethan Mollick showcases GPT-5.4's multimodal potential, combining data analysis with image generation to create novel visualizations. The overall theme is one of fast-paced iteration, both in business models and in the creative, practical applications of increasingly integrated AI systems.
